channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Michael Wolff Argues Trump Faces Mounting Political and Policy Challenges Across Multiple Fronts
item.description: Raw Story reports on comments made by author and Trump biographer Michael Wolff during an episode of the podcast 'Inside Trump's Head,' which he co-hosts with Joanna Coles of The Daily Beast. Wolff ar...

item.title: Andrew Malkinson criticises 24-year sentence given to man convicted of 2003 rape case
item.description: Andrew Malkinson, who was wrongly imprisoned for 17 years in one of the most serious miscarriages of justice in the UK, has described the 24-year sentence handed to the man convicted of the 2003 rape ...

item.title: Four House Democrats Join Republicans in Supporting Spending Bill That Reduces WIC Funding
item.description: A narrowly approved House spending bill has sparked criticism after four Democratic representatives voted alongside Republicans to pass legislation that includes significant reductions to federal nutr...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Fires Five Intelligence Analysts Over Controversial 2023 Richmond Memo
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel dismissed at least five intelligence analysts from the FBI's Richmond, Virginia, field office in connection with a controversial 2023 intelligence memo that examined efforts by...

item.title: Judge upholds 60-day jail contempt sentence in Matt Bevin child support document dispute
item.description: Former Kentucky Governor Matt Bevin is facing continued legal trouble after a judge refused to grant him relief from a 60-day jail sentence imposed for civil contempt of court in an ongoing child supp...

item.title: The Delayed Burial and Controversy Over Buffalo Bill Cody’s Final Resting Place
item.description: William “Buffalo Bill” Cody, one of the most iconic figures of the American frontier era, experienced an unusually delayed and controversial burial following his death on January 10, 1917, in Denver, ...

item.title: Federal judge refers DOJ attorneys for disciplinary review over alleged misconduct in subpoena case
item.description: A federal judge in Rhode Island appointed by former President Donald Trump has referred several Justice Department attorneys to a disciplinary committee following serious accusations of misconduct in ...

item.title: Kathy Hochul and Online Critics Mock Proposed Trump $250 Bill with Satirical Design
item.description: A political exchange unfolded online after New York Governor Kathy Hochul's press office shared a satirical image depicting President Donald Trump on a fictional $250 bill. The image was posted after ...

item.title: CBS Late-Night Ratings Drop Significantly After Replacing Stephen Colbert with Comics Unleashed
item.description: CBS experienced a notable decline in its late-night television viewership following the cancellation of Stephen Colbert's 'The Late Show.' The network replaced the long-running program with Byron Alle...

item.title: Starz Orders Eight-Episode 'Power: Legacy' Series Featuring Tommy Egan and Tariq St. Patrick
item.description: Starz has officially approved the next chapter of the successful Power franchise, announcing the greenlight of 'Power: Legacy', an eight-episode series that will continue the stories of fan-favorite c...

item.title: Sen. Ron Johnson Questions Need for Ebola Vaccines While Discussing Outbreak Preparedness Ahead of FIFA World Cup
item.description: A recent interview featuring Republican Senator Ron Johnson sparked debate after he downplayed the importance of Ebola vaccines while discussing public health preparedness. Speaking with LindellTV hos...

item.title: BBC Seeks Financial Records From Trump in Ongoing $10 Billion Defamation Lawsuit
item.description: A dispute over evidence discovery has emerged in President Donald Trump's ongoing $10 billion defamation lawsuit against the BBC. Trump filed the lawsuit after alleging that the broadcaster deceptivel...

item.title: Veteran '60 Minutes' Correspondents Choose to Remain at CBS Amid Leadership Upheaval and Mixed Public Reaction
item.description: Veteran '60 Minutes' correspondents Lesley Stahl, Bill Whitaker, and Jon Wertheim informed colleagues that they would remain with the long-running CBS news program despite recent firings that have sha...

item.title: DOJ Lawyer Argues in Court That Trump Administration Could Demolish Statue of Liberty Before Legal Challenge
item.description: During oral arguments before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit on Friday, a Justice Department lawyer representing the Trump administration stated that the government could potentially de...

item.title: Whistleblower Alleges Trump Administration Planned to Mark 2.7 Million Living People as Dead in Social Security Database
item.description: A former senior official at the Social Security Administration (SSA), Jeremiah Schofield, has come forward as a whistleblower, revealing that the Trump administration developed plans to add 2.7 millio...

item.title: Former Trump Official Warns White House Ballroom Donors Could Face Future Legal Scrutiny
item.description: A former Trump administration official, Miles Taylor, has warned that donors who contributed to President Donald Trump's White House ballroom project may face significant legal and ethical scrutiny in...

item.title: Three Veteran '60 Minutes' Correspondents Announce They Will Remain at the Program Amid CBS News Leadership Turmoil
item.description: Three longtime correspondents of CBS's news magazine program '60 Minutes'—Lesley Stahl, Bill Whitaker, and Jon Wertheim—have announced that they will remain with the show despite ongoing turmoil withi...

item.title: House members who left Congress to run for higher office suffer widespread primary losses, according to report
item.description: A growing number of U.S. House members who have left Congress to pursue higher political offices are experiencing unexpected electoral defeats, suggesting that leaving the House may now be a political...

item.title: Tony Dokoupil Pays Tribute to Scott Pelley Amid Turmoil at CBS News and '60 Minutes'
item.description: CBS Evening News anchor Tony Dokoupil publicly praised veteran journalist Scott Pelley following Pelley's dismissal from the long-running news program '60 Minutes.' During a broadcast, Dokoupil reflec...

item.title: Republican lawmakers express frustration over Trump’s policy decisions and legislative disruptions
item.description: According to reporting based on interviews with Republican congressional insiders, tensions are rising within the GOP over President Donald Trump’s recent actions and policy decisions. Senior aides an...
